gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/435)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/435)
text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ فِي يَدِهِ مِخْضَبَةٌ فِيهَا رَيْحَانٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,
‘I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and in his<sup>asws</sup> hand was a dyeing-box wherein was basil’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Yaqtin from Yunus ibn Ya‘qub who has said the following: “I once visited abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when there was a bucket for herbs in his hand with sweet basil therein.’”
